title: Hamiltonian Temporal Emergence
status: Formal refinement draft for peer-review-facing development
block_title: Time, Receipts, Admission, Physics Interfaces, and Continuum Edges
central_thesis: Describe local inside global temporal emergence as Hamiltonian-window readout over transported states.

claims.primary_content: Hamiltonian temporal emergence is a finite local-window construction over carried centers. Width-3, width-5, and width-7 reads emit exactly four, three, and two surviving composite centers while preserving source indices, source centers, forward receipts, and backward receipts.
claims.required_action: Add separate physical-dynamics theorems only when Hamiltonian dynamics beyond receipt-level window emergence are claimed.

math.primary_content: Use the paper body axioms, lemmas, and formalism as the math intake.
math.required_action: Promote every symbolic statement into a normalized claim row with assumptions and receipts.

formal_algebra_calculus.required_action: Split normal form, closed form, algebraic operators, calculus/window operators, and open obligations.

hand_work.primary_content: Use 03-CQE-workbook/WORKBOOK.md plus the analog toolkit guides.
hand_work.required_action: Write the physical reconstruction steps and boundary-collision handling for the paper.

code_rebuild.required_action: Bind a replayable command or mark the missing executable as an obligation.

lib_bindings.required_action: Resolve this binding into production/lib-forge or mark it as an adapter route.

tests_and_receipts.primary_content: Paper 09 includes production/formal-papers/CQE-paper-09/hamiltonian_window_emergence_receipt.json, verifying width-3/5/7 window counts, source-center preservation, reverse-receipt well-formedness, and the temporal-Z4 static-template boundary.
tests_and_receipts.required_action: Add broader tests only when later papers claim physical time reversal, static-Z4 temporal periodicity, or higher-order convergence.

deployment_kernel.primary_content: Deployable individually as CQE-paper-09 and selectable through the master suite.
deployment_kernel.required_action: Expose paper, block, and suite selectors with no duplicate routing logic.
